{{Quote|Their accent? It was Hrakian! Now, stop inter- ''ah! Of course!'' All we have to do is find a ''Hrakian'' spaceship!|C-3PO|<ref name="Gambler's World">"[[Gambler's World]]"</ref>}}
'''Hrakians''' were [[Near-Human]]s from [[Hraki]].

==Physiology==
Hrakians were [[Human/Legends|human-like]] and were recognizable by a kind of fat bulky [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that grew on their heads and on their [[Eye/Legends|eyebrows]]. They had a [[Color/Legends|yellowish]] skin. Hrakians were an average of 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] and could grow older than 85 [[Standard year/Legends|years]].

==Culture & History==
[[Hraki]] was a planet with tall mountain peaks and dense, brooky jungles. Nevertheless, the planet expanded to become a trading post in the region due to the growth of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] and the other species in the area.

Hrakians were a brave and enterprising species known for their reliability and their perseverance. They chose simplicity over difficulty and Hrakians could do a lot when they were doing a job. Sometimes they had a somewhat lazy and uninterested attitude that led them to the easiest solution.

The Hrakians were good at a fight and renowned as spacers. The major freighter ships of the Hrakians were a known sight in the [[Vorzyd sector/Legends|Vorzyd Sector]]. The Hrakians had an embassy in [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]] on [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. Hrakians were not really a sophisticated species and had no interest in politics. Hrakians were pleased with promised credits and a cantina at the end of the task.

The Hrakians played an important role in the growth of the [[Commonality]]. They transported a lot of workers in their freight ships who went to [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. One of the largest Hrakian firms was [[Hraki Intracluster Transport]].

When [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] took [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to Vorzyd V on a secret mission for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] were abducted for a while and held in a Hrakian ship by [[Blackhole]]. The Droids could enter this ship thanks to the help of a drunk Hrakian, called [[Branox]].

==Common Hrakian names==
*Drex Vahgr<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
*Gruxl Obbin<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds" />
